message:
Run tests in pull request CI

Add a test job to the CI workflow so pull requests run the
Vitest suite alongside the formatting check.

While validating the change, Biome reported existing formatting
drift in the Gemini provider and its tests, so this commit also
includes the resulting formatting-only updates.

files.patch:
@@ -26,3 +26,22 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Check formatting
         run: npm run format:check
+
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "20"
+          cache: "npm"
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: npm test
